content.en:
I am a Computer Science PhD candidate at the University of Exeter specializing in deep learning, AIGC, spatio-temporal data, transportation, and urban computing. My research focuses on designing multi-modal generative neural networks, integrating them with spatio-temporal / graph data analysis to solve complex urban (transportation) challenges.

I have a strong background in computer science and AI. In terms of data, I have experience working with spatio-temporal data, graphs, images, texts and multi-modal data. In terms of methods, I have expertise in deep learning, generative models (e.g., GANs, VAEs, diffusion models), reinforcement learning, computer vision, digital twin, etc.
content.zh:
我是一名埃克塞特大学的计算机科学博士研究生，专注于深度学习、AIGC、时空数据、交通和城市计算。我的研究重点是设计多模态生成神经网络，将它们与时空/图数据分析相结合，以解决复杂的城市（交通）挑战。

我在计算机科学和人工智能方面有着坚实的背景。在数据方面，我有处理时空数据、图、图像、文本和多模态数据的经验。在方法方面，我在深度学习、生成模型（如GANs、VAEs、扩散模型）、强化学习、计算机视觉、数字孪生等方面具有专业知识。

content.en: My research interests include deep learning, generative models, spatio-temporal data analysis, transportation and urban computing. I am particularly interested in multi-modal diffusion models and their applications in solving real-world urban challenges, such as road network generation, trajectory recovery, traffic forecasting, etc. I also love exploring more efficient and effective neural network architectures and training strategies to push the boundaries of what generative models can achieve.
content.zh: 我的研究兴趣包括深度学习、生成模型、时空数据分析、交通和城市计算。我尤其对多模态扩散模型及其在解决现实世界城市挑战（如道路网络生成、轨迹恢复、交通预测等）中的应用感兴趣。我也喜欢探索更高效、更强大的神经网络架构和训练策略，以推动生成模型的能力边界。
